name: Crab Vegetable Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chili sauce and mayonnaise.
2. Add the garlic, dry mustard, Worcestershire sauce, Tobasco sauce, and salt to the bowl.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped hard-boiled egg and crab meat.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight for best flavor development.
